florida_tenant.name: 3-day notice must state exact amount
florida_tenant.rule: Florida courts have held that a 3-day notice is invalid if it does not state the precise amount of rent due. An approximation or range is insufficient.
florida_tenant.user_benefit: If the notice amount is wrong or estimated, it may be procedurally invalid.

florida_tenant.name: Attorney fees cannot be included in 3-day notice amount
florida_tenant.rule: Attorney fees, late fees beyond what is specified in the lease, and speculative charges cannot be included in the 3-day notice amount.
florida_tenant.user_benefit: Any inflated amounts make the notice challengeable.

florida_tenant.name: Landlord must return security deposit within 15 days
florida_tenant.rule: If landlord does not intend to make a claim on the deposit, they must return it within 15 days. If they intend to make a claim, they must notify within 30 days.
florida_tenant.user_benefit: User has a counterclaim right if deposit is not returned properly.

new_york_employment.name: At-will employment still requires good faith
new_york_employment.rule: New York is an at-will employment state, but termination in violation of public policy or in retaliation for protected activity is still actionable.
new_york_employment.user_benefit: If termination was retaliatory, user may have a wrongful termination claim.

new_york_employment.name: Final paycheck must be paid on next regular payday
new_york_employment.rule: New York employers must pay all wages on the next regular payday following termination.
new_york_employment.user_benefit: If final paycheck was delayed, user has a wage claim.

new_york_employment.name: Non-compete must be reasonable in scope
new_york_employment.rule: New York courts will not enforce non-competes that are overbroad in geographic scope, duration, or nature of restricted activity.
new_york_employment.user_benefit: User may be able to challenge the enforceability of non-compete clause.

federal_debt.name: Debt validation right within 30 days
federal_debt.rule: Under FDCPA § 809(b), consumer has 30 days from first contact to dispute the debt and request validation. Collector must cease collection until validation is provided.
federal_debt.user_benefit: User can stop all collection activity immediately by sending validation request.

federal_debt.name: No contact before 8AM or after 9PM
federal_debt.rule: FDCPA prohibits calling before 8AM or after 9PM local time. Each violation can result in $1,000 statutory damages.
federal_debt.user_benefit: Document all call times — each violation is worth $1,000 in statutory damages.

federal_debt.name: Harassment and abuse prohibited
federal_debt.rule: Collectors cannot use obscene language, make repeated calls to annoy, or threaten violence. More than 7 calls in 7 days is presumed harassment.
federal_debt.user_benefit: Excessive calls constitute a strong FDCPA violation case.

california_employment.name: Final paycheck due immediately upon termination
california_employment.rule: California requires employers to pay all wages, including accrued vacation, at the time of termination. Waiting time penalties of one day's pay for each day late, up to 30 days.
california_employment.user_benefit: Substantial penalties accrue daily if final pay is delayed.

california_employment.name: Non-compete clauses are generally void
california_employment.rule: California Business & Professions Code § 16600 makes most non-compete agreements unenforceable, with very limited exceptions.
california_employment.user_benefit: Non-compete clauses in employment agreements are likely unenforceable.

general_housing.name: Fair Housing Act protections
general_housing.rule: The FHA prohibits discrimination based on race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, or disability in housing-related activities.
general_housing.user_benefit: If adverse action is motivated by protected characteristic, user has federal remedies.

general_housing.name: Retaliatory eviction prohibited in most states
general_housing.rule: Most states prohibit landlords from evicting tenants in retaliation for exercising legal rights such as requesting repairs or reporting code violations.
general_housing.user_benefit: If eviction follows a complaint or repair request, it may be retaliatory and unenforceable.

general_employment.name: FMLA leave protection
general_employment.rule: Eligible employees are entitled to 12 weeks of unpaid, job-protected leave for specified family and medical reasons. Employers with 50+ employees must comply.
general_employment.user_benefit: If termination occurred during or after FMLA leave, it may constitute interference or retaliation.

general_employment.name: Whistleblower protections
general_employment.rule: Federal and state laws protect employees who report illegal activity, safety violations, or fraud from retaliation.
general_employment.user_benefit: If terminated after reporting misconduct, user may have whistleblower retaliation claim.

general_consumer.name: FTC Act unfair and deceptive practices
general_consumer.rule: The FTC Act prohibits unfair or deceptive acts or practices in commerce. State consumer protection laws often provide additional private right of action.
general_consumer.user_benefit: User may file complaints with FTC and state AG, and potentially sue under state consumer protection statutes.

employment.name: End of Service Gratuity is mandatory
employment.rule: Under Federal Decree-Law No. 33 of 2021, employees are entitled to gratuity of 21 days wage per year for first 5 years, 30 days per year thereafter. Cannot be waived by contract.
employment.user_benefit: Employee is entitled to gratuity regardless of contract terms.

employment.name: Arbitrary dismissal compensation
employment.rule: If termination is found to be arbitrary, employee is entitled to compensation of up to 3 months wage in addition to all other entitlements.
employment.user_benefit: If dismissal cannot be justified, user has right to additional 3-month compensation.

employment.name: Notice period mandatory
employment.rule: Minimum 30 days notice required for both parties. Employer who terminates without notice must pay wage in lieu of notice.
employment.user_benefit: If notice was not given or less than 30 days, user is owed additional pay.

housing.name: 12 months eviction notice required
housing.rule: In Dubai, a landlord must give 12 months notice via notary public before eviction. Non-compliance invalidates the eviction.
housing.user_benefit: Eviction without 12 months notarized notice is procedurally invalid.

housing.name: Ejari registration mandatory
housing.rule: All tenancy contracts in Dubai must be registered with Ejari. Unregistered contracts may still protect tenant rights.
housing.user_benefit: Landlord's failure to register may weaken their legal position.

debt.name: Bounced cheque — 2022 amendment
debt.rule: Since 2022 amendment, some cheque cases are now civil rather than criminal. However, bounced cheques of significant value may still carry criminal liability.
debt.user_benefit: Depending on amount and circumstances, the matter may be handled civilly.

emploi.name: Delai de preavis selon anciennete
emploi.rule: La duree du preavis est calculee selon la formule: (anciennete en semaines) = (anciennete x 3) + 1 semaine par tranche de 3 ans. Depuis la loi du 26 decembre 2013.
emploi.user_benefit: Si le preavis donne est insuffisant, l'employeur doit une indemnite compensatoire.

emploi.name: Protection contre le licenciement abusif
emploi.rule: Le licenciement d'un travailleur pour des motifs etrangers a la personne ou a la necessite de l'entreprise est abusif. Indemnite: 3 a 17 semaines de remuneration.
emploi.user_benefit: L'utilisateur peut demander les motifs du licenciement dans les 2 mois.

logement.name: Bail de residence principale
logement.rule: Les baux de residence principale ont une duree standard de 9 ans. Le locataire peut resilier avec 3 mois de preavis. Le bailleur a des conditions strictes de resiliation.
logement.user_benefit: Le bailleur doit prouver un motif legal pour rompre le bail avant terme.

logement.name: Garantie locative limitee
logement.rule: La garantie locative ne peut exceder 2 mois de loyer depuis 2018. Elle doit etre placee sur un compte bancaire bloque.
logement.user_benefit: Si la garantie demandee depasse 2 mois, c'est illegal.

consommateur.name: Droit de retractation 14 jours
consommateur.rule: Pour les achats en ligne, le consommateur dispose de 14 jours pour se retracter sans avoir a justifier de motifs.
consommateur.statute: Code de droit economique, Livre VI
consommateur.user_benefit: Le consommateur peut retourner tout achat en ligne dans les 14 jours.

consommateur.name: Garantie legale de 2 ans
consommateur.rule: Tous les biens de consommation beneficient d'une garantie legale de 2 ans. Le vendeur est responsable des defauts de conformite.
consommateur.statute: Code de droit economique, Livre VI
consommateur.user_benefit: Le vendeur doit reparer ou remplacer gratuitement pendant 2 ans.
